description: Co-Dialectic hooks — persistent survival across context compaction. Plugin-level hooks fire regardless of skill activation state. SessionStart syncs the userSettings skill. UserPromptSubmit reads ~/.codialectic/state.json and re-injects codi context on every turn.

statusLine._note: Claude Code reads statusLine from user settings.json, not plugin hooks.json. This entry is documentation — the install.sh / SKILL.md installer wires statusline.sh into ~/.claude/settings.json at install time.
